# ML serving dependencies (US-201 inference bridge).
#
# The base API (requirements.txt) runs the deterministic rule-based scorer with
# NO heavy ML libraries. To serve the TRAINED model on new applications, install
# these in addition and set RISK_SCORER=ml. You also need the trained model file
# at models/production/risk_model_v1.pkl (generated by
# `python -m src.risk_model.train_hardened`, or copied from your training run).
-r requirements.txt
pandas==2.2.2
numpy==2.1.1
lightgbm==4.5.0
joblib==1.4.2
pyarrow==17.0.0
